local Z=table.insert local return(function(z,b,E,q,W,N,T,f,j,v,m,o,R,t,g,Y,x,V,c,a,Q,A,n)V,x,m,A,j,Y,f,v,n,g,t,R,a,c,o,Q={},function(z)local Z,R=-958183-(-958184),z[248088-248087]while R do
